raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo mehß eßam Sweschi-
neeki un Eedsihwotaji tawa
Preekschâ / itt ka wiſſi muhſu
Tehwi/ Muhſo Deenas wirß
Semmes irr ta ka Ehna / un
tur Kaweschanas newatd.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "KUNGß/ muhſu Deews!
wifſa ſcht Rohpa/ ko mehß eßam
fakrahjuſchi/ tew weenn Nammu
darriht preeksch tawu ſwehtu
Wahrdu/ ta irr no tawas Roh-
kas/ un wiſſ tew peederr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un eßinnu mans Deews/
ka tu to Sirdi pahrwanni/ un
Skaidriba tew labbi patihk/ es
eſmu no fawas fkaidras Sirds
wiſſas ſchabs Leekas ar labbu
Prantu dewis/ un eſmu nu ar
Lihgſminibu tawus Landis redſeis
labbis Praktis tevim dohdam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ak KUNGß! tu Deews
muhſu Tehwu/Ahbraama/Jhsa-
aka un Israëka/ paſargi muh-
ſchigt tcho paſchu eekſch ta Sirds
Prahta/ un tawu Lauschu Doh-
maſchanalnn/ un atgreesi winnu
Sirdi pee tewi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un dohd mannam Deh-
lam Salamanam weenn pilniqu
Sirdi/ tawus Bauslus/ un ta-
was Leezibas/ un tawus Likku-
mus turreht/ un wiſſu padar-
ritht/ un ſcho augſtu Nammu pa-
darriht/ us ko eß eſmu taiſijecs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Dahwids fazztja uß
wiſſu Draudsibu : Teizeet jelle
to KUNGU juhſu Deewu. Tad
teize wiſſa Draudse to KUNGU
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee uppureja tam KUNG-
AM Uppureus / tee arridsan
uppureja tam KUNGAM De-
dsamo- Uppureus ohtrß Deenas
Rihtß tuhkſtochus Wehrſchus/
tuhkſtochus Annus / tuhkſto-
chus Zehrus ar faweem Dsexra-
mo-Uppureem/ un zitteem Uppu-
reim leela Pulkâ preeksch wiſſu
Israëlu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee ehde un dſehre tad
Deend ta KUNGA Preekscha ar
leeln Lihgſminibu. Un darrija Sa-
lamanu Dahwida Dehlu ohtra
Reiſe par Kehuixu / un fwatdi-
ja to preeksch to KUNGU par
Walditaju / un Zadafu par
Preestert.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta fehdeja Salamans us
ta KUNGA Krehsfu/weens Keh-
ninsch tawa Tehwa Dahwida
Weeta/ uu tam iſdewahß labbi/
un wiſſ Israëls klaustja tam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſſi Leelee-Kungi un
Warrenee/ ir wiſſi Behrui takeh-
nina Dahwida dewe to Rohku /
(us to/) ka tee appatſch to Keh-
nizu Salamannu gribbeja buht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGß pa-
augſtinaja Salamanu kohti aug-
ſti preeksch wiſſu Israëlu / un
wiſſch dewe tam weenu apgoß-
dinatu Kehnixa Walſtibu/ kah-
da wehl ne weenam kehninam
preeksch winna pahr Israëlu bi-
just.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta bija Dahwids Jsaja
Mimimm 2 Dehls
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
